title: SE JT114RS 10" Aluminum Ring Stick
description:
Make sure you're sizing your rings correctly with the Universal Hobby Aluminum Ring Sizing Stick! This ring stock features both US and European sizes, making it a perfect tool for professional and hobby jewelry makers alike. The overall length is 10", so it will fit in most tool boxes and crafting carry cases. The US sizes are 1-15 (13mm - 24mm) and the European sizes are 41-76. It even has International sizes 1-36, so you'll be able to size just about any ring accurately. It's constructed of solid aluminum so you can count on it for years to come. Make sure you have one of these with your jewelry making tools for sizing, enlarging and reshaping rings!
